events.text: Assessment complete: found a lock-without-tag (or tag-without-lock) sequence violation on the energy-isolating device, which breaks the OSHA 1910.147(c)(5) requirement that lockout devices be paired with an identifying tag. Marked as **fail / critical risk** — work must stop until the authorized employee applies a matched lock+tag and isolation is re-verified before proceeding. Written to `/app/answer.json`.
